rules: imagery should have high appetite appeal
silo images should be photographed consistently according to packaging or product type
minimize reflections on plastic, foil, and shiny packaging, especially when covering important product information
remove unnecessary stickers not part of package design, such as promotional stickers or sample-specific labels
packaging and labels should be presented straight, not angled or crooked
photograph each unique and meaningful side of the product package
front view means the side with predominant brand and labeling, format, variant, and size/quantity
products should be evenly lit from side to side and top to bottom
exposure and color should correctly represent the item
maintain separation between product and background
clip products onto pure white background, RGB 255/255/255
retouch dirt, dust, fingerprints, damage, blemishes, expiration dates, lot numbers, and sample-only information
lifestyle images should show the product in a realistic, professionally lit and styled setting
the product being sold should remain the hero of the lifestyle image
packaging should be incorporated into lifestyle images when practical to connect lifestyle to silo shots

main_image.label: Main Image
main_image.description: Primary carousel image/hero image for the PDP.

silo_front.label: Silo, Front
silo_front.guidance: Show the product straight-on or top down when applicable on a pure white background.
silo_front.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image on a pure white background with the label fully legible.

silo_alternate.label: Silo, Alternate
silo_alternate.guidance: Show the side or back of the product straight-on with all label information clearly legible.
silo_alternate.recommendation: Add a side or back silo image with label information straight, clear, and legible.

silo_single.label: Silo, Single
silo_single.guidance: Show a single can, bottle, or item from a multipack straight-on on a pure white background with the label fully legible.
silo_single.recommendation: Add an individual item image from the multipack to clarify the single-unit packaging.

dimensions.label: Dimensions
dimensions.guidance: Use a scale avatar or apply product dimensions to the image to communicate size and scale.
dimensions.recommendation: Add a dimensions or scale image to communicate product size clearly.

lifestyle_in_use.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_in_use.guidance: Show the product in use in a realistic setting that reflects everyday use.
lifestyle_in_use.recommendation: Add a lifestyle image showing the product in use in a realistic everyday setting.

feature_graphic.label: Feature Graphic
feature_graphic.guidance: Highlight key product features or benefits using clean, legible graphic callouts.
feature_graphic.recommendation: Add a clean feature graphic highlighting key product benefits or attributes.

graphic_nutrition.label: Graphic, Nutrition
graphic_nutrition.guidance: Pull from packaging flat for legibility and clarity.
graphic_nutrition.recommendation: Add a flat nutrition graphic so key nutrition information is clear and legible.

graphic_ingredients.label: Graphic, Ingredients
graphic_ingredients.guidance: Pull from packaging flat for legibility and clarity.
graphic_ingredients.recommendation: Add a flat ingredients graphic so ingredient information is clear and legible.

graphic_guarantee.label: Graphic, Guarantee
graphic_guarantee.guidance: Display the Private Brand Guarantee graphic as a clean, centered digital asset when applicable.
graphic_guarantee.recommendation: Add a clean guarantee graphic when applicable for private brand products.

graphic_instructions.label: Graphic, Instructions
graphic_instructions.guidance: Display instructions using step-by-step graphics or diagrams to clearly communicate preparation or usage.
graphic_instructions.recommendation: Add a clear preparation or instruction graphic when the product requires prep or usage steps.

silo_alt_in_pack.label: Silo, Alt, In Pack
silo_alt_in_pack.guidance: Show the side or back of the product in pack straight-on with all label information clearly legible.
silo_alt_in_pack.recommendation: Add an in-pack alternate silo image showing side or back label details clearly.

silo_detail.label: Silo, Detail
silo_detail.guidance: Show the product sliced, halved, opened, or detailed to reveal interior color, texture, and structure.
silo_detail.recommendation: Add a product detail image showing interior texture, color, or structure.

graphic_certification.label: Graphic, Certification
graphic_certification.guidance: Display all certifications present on packaging as clean digital badges, ensuring they are validated and clearly visible in the image set.
graphic_certification.recommendation: Add a clean certification badge graphic when certifications are present on packaging.

Size Chart: Display available size variants.
Flavor/Scent Graphic: Highlight the product's flavor or scent.

Consistency in angle is critical to maintain a unified PDP and shelf presentation.
